entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The primary grain crop being stored and assessed for losses in Kenya

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The country where the off-farm grain storage survey was conducted

entities.name: POSTHARVEST LOSSES
entities.description: The reduction in quantity or quality of grain after harvest during storage

entities.name: OFF-FARM GRAIN STORAGE
entities.description: The practice of storing grain in facilities outside the farm, managed by government, traders, or processors

entities.name: SURVEY
entities.description: The data collection method used to assess perceived losses and associated factors

entities.name: PUBLIC STORES
entities.description: Grain storage facilities owned and managed by the government

entities.name: PRIVATE STORES
entities.description: Grain storage facilities owned and managed by traders or processors

entities.name: INSECTS
entities.description: Pests that contribute to grain losses in storage

entities.name: MOLDS
entities.description: Fungal organisms that cause grain spoilage and losses

entities.name: MOISTURE LOSS
entities.description: Loss of grain weight due to evaporation of water

entities.name: RODENTS
entities.description: Vertebrate pests that consume or damage stored grain

entities.name: SPILLAGE
entities.description: Physical loss of grain due to leaks or accidents during handling and storage

entities.name: BIRDS
entities.description: Vertebrate pests that contribute to grain losses

entities.name: REGRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical method used to determine factors associated with higher or lower losses

entities.name: RESIDUAL INSECTICIDES
entities.description: The use of remaining insecticide chemicals for pest control in stores

entities.name: LOW QUALITY MAIZE
entities.description: Maize grain with poor initial quality characteristics before storage

entities.name: REUSE OF STORAGE BAGS
entities.description: The practice of using storage bags multiple times

entities.name: UNTIMELY CONTROL OF STORAGE PESTS
entities.description: Delayed or poorly timed application of pest control measures

entities.name: MOIST TRANSITIONAL ZONE
entities.description: An agro-climatic zone associated with higher grain losses

entities.name: MOIST MID-ALTITUDE ZONE
entities.description: An agro-climatic zone associated with higher grain losses

entities.name: DRY MID-ALTITUDE ZONE
entities.description: An agro-climatic zone associated with higher grain losses

entities.name: INFESTATION REPORTS
entities.description: The practice of initiating pest control based on reports of infestation

entities.name: CLEANING AND DRYING GRAIN
entities.description: Pre-storage practices to reduce moisture and contaminants

entities.name: EARLY PEST CONTROL
entities.description: Proactive and timely application of pest control measures

entities.name: STORAGE PERIODS
entities.description: The duration for which grain is kept in off-farm stores
